                                   .....##                                   Stam: |||||    Speed: 100     Move: 0(W)
                                   .......                                   Str: 8         Dex: 8         Power: --
┌─ Construction ──────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│<< All >>                                    │ Remove Empty Window Frame                                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤                                                                        │
^Remove Empty Window Frame                    │ Stage/Variant #1: floor                                                │
│Remove Concrete Floor                        │ Result: Interlocking wooden tiles that are more than likely treated    │
│Remove Reinforced Concrete Floor             │ against fire, with wooden posts and beams that can support a roof.     │
│Remove Linoleum Tiles                        │ Required skills: fabrication (3)                                       │
│Remove Wooden Floor                          │ Requires: empty window                                                 │
│Remove Concrete Wall                         │ Time to complete: 1 hour                                               │
│Remove Reinforced Concrete Wall              │ Tools required:                                                        │
│Remove Wall                                  │ > 1 tool with hammering of 2 or more.                                  │
│Remove Rock Wall                             │ > 1 tool with chiseling of 2 or more.                                  │
│Remove Brick Wall                            │ > 1 tool with prying of 1 or more.                                     │
│Remove Wooden Wall                           │ > 1 tool with digging of 3 or more.                                    │
│Remove Segment of Road/Sidewalk              │ > bronze nail puller OR claw bar OR nail puller                        │
│Remove Metal Door                            │                                                                        │
│Remove Rebar Cage                            │ Stage/Variant #2: floor                                                │
│Remove Concrete Column                       │ Result: Interlocking wooden tiles that are more than likely treated    │
│Remove Glass Wall                            │ against fire, with wooden posts and beams that can support a roof.     │
│Remove glass door                            │ Required skills: fabrication (3)                                       │
│Deconstruct Fireplace                        │ Requires: empty metal window frame                                     │
│Place Battery Charger                        │ Time to complete: 1 hour                                               │
│Place Recharging Station                     │ Tools required:                                                        │
│Place Air Compressor                         │ > 1 tool with hammering of 2 or more.                                  │
│Place Makeshift Ammonia Machine Pipework     │ > 1 tool with chiseling of 2 or more.                                  │
│Place Makeshift Ammonia Machine Reactor      │ > 1 tool with prying of 3 or more.                                     │
│Place Home Freezer                           │ > 1 tool with digging of 3 or more.                                    │
│Place Arcade Machine                         │ > angle grinder (200 charges)                                          │
│Place ASRG                                   │                                                                        │
│Place Autoclave                              │                                                                        │
│Place Band Saw                               │ Press [h, LEFT, or 4 or l, RIGHT, or 6] to tab.                        │
│Place Large Battery                          │ Press [f, F, or /] to search.                                          │
│Place Car Battery                            │ Filter: All — Press [;] to cycle.                                      │
